text.title: testing-with-assistive-technology Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the testing-with-assistive-technology methodology end-to-end.

step.name: configure-ci-scan
step.action: Install axe-core / pa11y / lighthouse-ci; fail build on new violations. Capture baseline.

step.name: configure-manual-sweep
step.action: Schedule pre-release sweep on critical journeys with VoiceOver + NVDA + keyboard-only.

step.name: schedule-at-user-session
step.action: Recruit ≥1 user per quarter; pay for time; schedule moderated session.

step.name: standardise-bug-report
step.action: Add a11y-bug template with required fields (WCAG SC, repro, APG pattern, scope).
